verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavit itaque Isaac Jacob, et benedixit eum, præcepitque ei dicens : Noli accipere conjugem de genere Chanaan :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֥א יִצְחָ֛ק אֶֽל־יַעֲקֹ֖ב וַיְבָ֣רֶךְ אֹת֑וֹ וַיְצַוֵּ֙הוּ֙ וַיֹּ֣אמֶר ל֔וֹ לֹֽא־תִקַּ֥ח אִשָּׁ֖ה מִבְּנ֥וֹת כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Isaac called Jacob, and blessed him, and charged him, saying: Take not a wife of the stock of Chanaan:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Isaak kutsui poikansa Jakobin ja siunasi häntä, käski ja sanoi hänelle: älä ota emäntää Kanaanin tyttäristä.
verses.king_james: And Isaac called Jacob, and blessed him, and charged him, and said unto him, Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed vade, et proficiscere in Mesopotamiam Syriæ, ad domum Bathuel patris matris tuæ, et accipe tibi inde uxorem de filiabus Laban avunculi tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֥וּם לֵךְ֙ פַּדֶּ֣נָֽה אֲרָ֔ם בֵּ֥יתָה בְתוּאֵ֖ל אֲבִ֣י אִמֶּ֑ךָ וְקַח־לְךָ֤ מִשָּׁם֙ אִשָּׁ֔ה מִבְּנ֥וֹת לָבָ֖ן אֲחִ֥י אִמֶּֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But go, and take a journey to Mesopotamia of Syria, to the house of Bathuel, thy mother's father, and take thee a wife thence of the daughters of Laban, thy uncle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan valmista ja mene Mesopotamiaan, Betuelin sinun äitis isän huoneesen: ja ota sinulles sieltä emäntä, Labanin sinun enos tyttäristä.
verses.king_james: Arise, go to Padan–aram, to the house of Bethuel thy mother’s father; and take thee a wife from thence of the daughters of Laban thy mother’s brother.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus autem omnipotens benedicat tibi, et crescere te faciat, atque multiplicet, ut sis in turbas populorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֤ל שַׁדַּי֙ יְבָרֵ֣ךְ אֹֽתְךָ֔ וְיַפְרְךָ֖ וְיַרְבֶּ֑ךָ וְהָיִ֖יתָ לִקְהַ֥ל עַמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And God almighty bless thee, and make thee to increase and multiply thee: that thou mayst be a multitude of people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jumala kaikkivaltias siunatkoon sinua, ja tehköön sinun hedelmälliseksi ja enätköön sinun, ettäs tulisit (suureksi) kansain joukoksi.
verses.king_james: And God Almighty bless thee, and make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, that thou mayest be a multitude of people;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et det tibi benedictiones Abrahæ, et semini tuo post te : ut possideas terram peregrinationis tuæ, quam pollicitus est avo tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִֽתֶּן־לְךָ֙ אֶת־בִּרְכַּ֣ת אַבְרָהָ֔ם לְךָ֖ וּלְזַרְעֲךָ֣ אִתָּ֑ךְ לְרִשְׁתְּךָ֙ אֶת־אֶ֣רֶץ מְגֻרֶ֔יךָ אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥ן אֱלֹהִ֖ים לְאַבְרָהָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And give the blessings of Abraham to thee, and to thy seed after thee: that thou mayst possess the land of thy sojournment, which he promised to thy grandfather.
verses.finnish_biblia: Antakoon myös sinulle Abrahamin siunauksen, sinulle ja sinun siemenelles sinun kanssas: periäkses sitä maata, jossas muukalainen olet, jonka Jumala Abrahamille antanut on.
verses.king_james: And give thee the blessing of Abraham, to thee, and to thy seed with thee; that thou mayest inherit the land wherein thou art a stranger, which God gave unto Abraham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque dimisisset eum Isaac, profectus venit in Mesopotamiam Syriæ ad Laban filium Bathuel Syri, fratrem Rebeccæ matris suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֤ח יִצְחָק֙ אֶֽת־יַעֲקֹ֔ב וַיֵּ֖לֶךְ פַּדֶּ֣נָֽה אֲרָ֑ם אֶל־לָבָ֤ן בֶּן־בְּתוּאֵל֙ הָֽאֲרַמִּ֔י אֲחִ֣י רִבְקָ֔ה אֵ֥ם יַעֲקֹ֖ב וְעֵשָֽׂו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Isaac had sent him away, he took his journey and went to Mesopotamia of Syria, to Laban, the son of Bathuel, the Syrian, brother to Rebecca, his mother.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lähetti Isaak Jakobin tyköänsä menemään Mesopotamiaan, Labanin, Betuelin Syrialaisen pojan tykö, Rebekan, Jakobin ja Esaun äidin, veljen.
verses.king_james: And Isaac sent away Jacob: and he went to Padan–aram unto Laban, son of Bethuel the Syrian, the brother of Rebekah, Jacob’s and Esau’s mother.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videns autem Esau quod benedixisset pater suus Jacob, et misisset eum in Mesopotamiam Syriæ, ut inde uxorem duceret ; et quod post benedictionem præcepisset ei, dicens : Non accipies uxorem de filiabus Chanaan :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣רְא עֵשָׂ֗ו כִּֽי־בֵרַ֣ךְ יִצְחָק֮ אֶֽת־יַעֲקֹב֒ וְשִׁלַּ֤ח אֹתוֹ֙ פַּדֶּ֣נָֽה אֲרָ֔ם לָקַֽחַת־ל֥וֹ מִשָּׁ֖ם אִשָּׁ֑ה בְּבָרְכ֣וֹ אֹת֔וֹ וַיְצַ֤ו עָלָיו֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר לֹֽא־תִקַּ֥ח אִשָּׁ֖ה מִבְּנ֥וֹת כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Esau seeing that his father had blessed Jacob, and had sent him into Mesopotamia of Syria, to marry a wife thence; and that after the blessing he had charged him, saying: Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Chanaan:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska Esau näki, että Isaak oli siunannut Jakobin, ja lähettänyt hänen Mesopotamiaan ottamaan sieltä itsellensä emäntää: ja että hän, sittekuin hän hänen siunannut oli, käski häntä ja sanoi: ei sinun pidä ottaman emäntää Kanaanin tyttäristä.
verses.king_james: When Esau saw that Isaac had blessed Jacob, and sent him away to Padan–aram, to take him a wife from thence; and that as he blessed him he gave him a charge, saying, Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan;

verses.latin_vulgate: quodque obediens Jacob parentibus suis isset in Syriam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֣ע יַעֲקֹ֔ב אֶל־אָבִ֖יו וְאֶל־אִמּ֑וֹ וַיֵּ֖לֶךְ פַּדֶּ֥נָֽה אֲרָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And that Jacob obeying his parents, was gone into Syria:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja että Jakob oli isällensä ja äidillensä kuuliainen; ja meni Mesopotamiaan.
verses.king_james: And that Jacob obeyed his father and his mother, and was gone to Padan–aram;

verses.latin_vulgate: probans quoque quod non libenter aspiceret filias Chanaan pater suus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣רְא עֵשָׂ֔ו כִּ֥י רָע֖וֹת בְּנ֣וֹת כְּנָ֑עַן בְּעֵינֵ֖י יִצְחָ֥ק אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Experiencing also, that his father was not well pleased with the daughters of Chanaan:
verses.finnish_biblia: Esau näki myös, ettei Isaak hänen isänsä voinut nähdä Kanaanin tyttäriä;
verses.king_james: And Esau seeing that the daughters of Canaan pleased not Isaac his father;

verses.latin_vulgate: ivit ad Ismaëlem, et duxit uxorem absque iis, quas prius habebat, Maheleth filiam Ismaël filii Abraham, sororem Nabaioth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ עֵשָׂ֖ו אֶל־יִשְׁמָעֵ֑אל וַיִּקַּ֡ח אֶֽת־מָחֲלַ֣ת ׀ בַּת־יִשְׁמָעֵ֨אל בֶּן־אַבְרָהָ֜ם אֲח֧וֹת נְבָי֛וֹת עַל־נָשָׁ֖יו ל֥וֹ לְאִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: He went to Ismael, and took to wife, besides them he had before, Maheleth, the daughter of Ismael, Abraham's son, the sister of Nabajoth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meni Esau Ismaelin tykö: ja otti Mahalatin Ismaelin Abrahamin pojan tyttären, Nabojotin sisaren, emännäksensä, paitsi entisiä.
verses.king_james: Then went Esau unto Ishmael, and took unto the wives which he had Mahalath the daughter of Ishmael Abraham’s son, the sister of Nebajoth, to be his wife.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur egressus Jacob de Bersabee, pergebat Haran.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֥א יַעֲקֹ֖ב מִבְּאֵ֣ר שָׁ֑בַע וַיֵּ֖לֶךְ חָרָֽנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Jacob being departed from Bersabee, went on to Haran.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Jakob läksi BerSabasta: ja meni Haraniin.
verses.king_james: And Jacob went out from Beer–sheba, and went toward Haran.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque venisset ad quemdam locum, et vellet in eo requiescere post solis occubitum, tulit de lapidibus qui jacebant, et supponens capiti suo, dormivit in eodem loco.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְגַּ֨ע בַּמָּק֜וֹם וַיָּ֤לֶן שָׁם֙ כִּי־בָ֣א הַשֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ וַיִּקַּח֙ מֵאַבְנֵ֣י הַמָּק֔וֹם וַיָּ֖שֶׂם מְרַֽאֲשֹׁתָ֑יו וַיִּשְׁכַּ֖ב בַּמָּק֥וֹם הַהֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he was come to a certain place, and would rest in it after sunset, he took of the stones that lay there, and putting under his head, slept in the same place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja joutui yhteen paikkaan, ja oli siinä yötä: sillä aurinko oli laskenut, ja otti kiven siitä paikasta, ja pani päänsä alaiseksi, ja makasi siinä paikassa.
verses.king_james: And he lighted upon a certain place, and tarried there all night, because the sun was set; and he took of the stones of that place, and put them for his pillows, and lay down in that place to sleep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viditque in somnis scalam stantem super terram, et cacumen illius tangens cælum : angelos quoque Dei ascendentes et descendentes per eam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּחֲלֹ֗ם וְהִנֵּ֤ה סֻלָּם֙ מֻצָּ֣ב אַ֔רְצָה וְרֹאשׁ֖וֹ מַגִּ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמָ֑יְמָה וְהִנֵּה֙ מַלְאֲכֵ֣י אֱלֹהִ֔ים עֹלִ֥ים וְיֹרְדִ֖ים בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he saw in his sleep a ladder standing upon the earth, and the top thereof touching heaven: the angels also of God ascending and descending by it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja näki unta, ja katso, tikapuut seisoivat maan päällä, joiden pää ulottui taivaasen: ja katso, Jumalan enkelit kävivät ylös ja alas niitä myöten.
verses.king_james: And he dreamed, and behold a ladder set up on the earth, and the top of it reached to heaven: and behold the angels of God ascending and descending on it.

verses.latin_vulgate: et Dominum innixum scalæ dicentem sibi : Ego sum Dominus Deus Abraham patris tui, et Deus Isaac : terram, in qua dormis, tibi dabo et semini tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּ֨ה יְהֹוָ֜ה נִצָּ֣ב עָלָיו֮ וַיֹּאמַר֒ אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה אֱלֹהֵי֙ אַבְרָהָ֣ם אָבִ֔יךָ וֵאלֹהֵ֖י יִצְחָ֑ק הָאָ֗רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֤ר אַתָּה֙ שֹׁכֵ֣ב עָלֶ֔יהָ לְךָ֥ אֶתְּנֶ֖נָּה וּלְזַרְעֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord leaning upon the ladder saying to him: I am the Lord God of Abraham thy father, and the God of Isaac: The land, wherein thou sleepest, I will give to thee and to thy seed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja katso, Herra seisoi niiden päällä, ja sanoi: Minä olen Herra, Abrahamin sinun isäs Jumala, ja Isaakin Jumala: tämän maan, jonka päällä sinä makaat, annan minä sinulle ja sinun siemenelles.
verses.king_james: And, behold, the Lord stood above it, and said, I am the Lord God of Abraham thy father, and the God of Isaac: the land whereon thou liest, to thee will I give it, and to thy seed;

verses.latin_vulgate: Eritque semen tuum quasi pulvis terræ : dilataberis ad occidentem, et orientem, et septentrionem, et meridiem : et benedicentur in te et in semine tuo cunctæ tribus terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֤ה זַרְעֲךָ֙ כַּעֲפַ֣ר הָאָ֔רֶץ וּפָרַצְתָּ֛ יָ֥מָּה וָקֵ֖דְמָה וְצָפֹ֣נָה וָנֶ֑גְבָּה וְנִבְרְכ֥וּ בְךָ֛ כׇּל־מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ת הָאֲדָמָ֖ה וּבְזַרְעֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thy seed shall be as the dust of the earth: thou shalt spread abroad to the west, and to the east, and to the north, and to the south: and IN THEE and thy seed, all the tribes of the earth SHALL BE BLESSED.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinun siemenes pitää oleman niinkuin maan tomu, ja sinun pitää leviämän länteen ja itään, pohjaan ja etelään päin. Ja sinussa pitää kaikki sukukunnat maan päällä siunatuksi tuleman, ja sinun siemenessäs.
verses.king_james: And thy seed shall be as the dust of the earth, and thou shalt spread abroad to the west, and to the east, and to the north, and to the south: and in thee and in thy seed shall all the families of the earth be blessed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ero custos tuus quocumque perrexeris, et reducam te in terram hanc : nec dimittam nisi complevero universa quæ dixi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּ֨ה אָנֹכִ֜י עִמָּ֗ךְ וּשְׁמַרְתִּ֙יךָ֙ בְּכֹ֣ל אֲשֶׁר־תֵּלֵ֔ךְ וַהֲשִׁ֣בֹתִ֔יךָ אֶל־הָאֲדָמָ֖ה הַזֹּ֑את כִּ֚י לֹ֣א אֶֽעֱזׇבְךָ֔ עַ֚ד אֲשֶׁ֣ר אִם־עָשִׂ֔יתִי אֵ֥ת אֲשֶׁר־דִּבַּ֖רְתִּי לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will be thy keeper whithersoever thou goest, and will bring thee back into this land: neither will I leave thee, till I shall have accomplished all that I have said.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja katso, minä olen sinun kanssas, ja varjelen sinua, kuhunkas ikänänsä joudut, ja saatan sinun jällensä tälle maalle: sillä en minä hylkää sinua siihenasti, että minä kaikki teen, mitä minä sinulle puhunut olen.
verses.king_james: And, behold, I am with thee, and will keep thee in all places whither thou goest, and will bring thee again into this land; for I will not leave thee, until I have done that which I have spoken to thee of.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque evigilasset Jacob de somno, ait : Vere Dominus est in loco isto, et ego nesciebam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּיקַ֣ץ יַעֲקֹב֮ מִשְּׁנָתוֹ֒ וַיֹּ֕אמֶר אָכֵן֙ יֵ֣שׁ יְהֹוָ֔ה בַּמָּק֖וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה וְאָנֹכִ֖י לֹ֥א יָדָֽעְתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Jacob awaked out of sleep, he said: Indeed the Lord is in this place, and I knew it not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska Jakob heräsi unestansa, niin hän sanoi: totisesti on Herra tässä paikassa: ja en minä sitä tietänyt.
verses.king_james: And Jacob awaked out of his sleep, and he said, Surely the Lord is in this place; and I knew it not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pavensque, Quam terribilis est, inquit, locus iste ! non est hic aliud nisi domus Dei, et porta cæli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּירָא֙ וַיֹּאמַ֔ר מַה־נּוֹרָ֖א הַמָּק֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה אֵ֣ין זֶ֗ה כִּ֚י אִם־בֵּ֣ית אֱלֹהִ֔ים וְזֶ֖ה שַׁ֥עַר הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And trembling, he said: How terrible is this place? this is no other but the house of God, and the gate of heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän pelkäsi, ja sanoi: kuinka peljättävä on tämä paikka! ei tässä muu ole kuin Jumalan huone ja taivaan ovi.
verses.king_james: And he was afraid, and said, How dreadful is this place! this is none other but the house of God, and this is the gate of heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surgens ergo Jacob mane, tulit lapidem quem supposuerat capiti suo, et erexit in titulum, fundens oleum desuper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּשְׁכֵּ֨ם יַעֲקֹ֜ב בַּבֹּ֗קֶר וַיִּקַּ֤ח אֶת־הָאֶ֙בֶן֙ אֲשֶׁר־שָׂ֣ם מְרַֽאֲשֹׁתָ֔יו וַיָּ֥שֶׂם אֹתָ֖הּ מַצֵּבָ֑ה וַיִּצֹ֥ק שֶׁ֖מֶן עַל־רֹאשָֽׁהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jacob arising in the morning, took the stone which he had laid under his head, and set it up for a title, pouring oil upon the top of it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jakob nousi varhain aamulla, ja otti kiven, jonka hän oli pannut päänsä alaiseksi, ja pani sen pystyälle muistopatsaaksi: ja vuodatti öljyä sen päälle.
verses.king_james: And Jacob rose up early in the morning, and took the stone that he had put for his pillows, and set it up for a pillar, and poured oil upon the top of it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Appellavitque nomen urbis Bethel, quæ prius Luza vocabatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֛א אֶת־שֵֽׁם־הַמָּק֥וֹם הַה֖וּא בֵּֽית־אֵ֑ל וְאוּלָ֛ם ל֥וּז שֵׁם־הָעִ֖יר לָרִאשֹׁנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he called the name of the city Bethel, which before was called Luza.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kutsui siis sen paikan BetEl; vaan muinaisiin aikoin se kutsuttiin Luts.
verses.king_james: And he called the name of that place Beth–el: but the name of that city was called Luz at the first.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vovit etiam votum, dicens : Si fuerit Deus mecum, et custodierit me in via, per quam ego ambulo, et dederit mihi panem ad vescendum, et vestimentum ad induendum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּדַּ֥ר יַעֲקֹ֖ב נֶ֣דֶר לֵאמֹ֑ר אִם־יִהְיֶ֨ה אֱלֹהִ֜ים עִמָּדִ֗י וּשְׁמָרַ֙נִי֙ בַּדֶּ֤רֶךְ הַזֶּה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָנֹכִ֣י הוֹלֵ֔ךְ וְנָֽתַן־לִ֥י לֶ֛חֶם לֶאֱכֹ֖ל וּבֶ֥גֶד לִלְבֹּֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made a vow, saying: If God shall be with me, and shall keep me in the way, by which I walk, and shall give me bread to eat, and raiment to put on,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Jakob teki lupauksen, sanoen: jos Jumala on minun kanssani, ja varjelee minua tällä tiellä, jota minä vaellan, antaa myös minulle leipää syödäkseni, ja vaatetta verhokseni:
verses.king_james: And Jacob vowed a vow, saying, If God will be with me, and will keep me in this way that I go, and will give me bread to eat, and raiment to put on,

verses.latin_vulgate: reversusque fuero prospere ad domum patris mei : erit mihi Dominus in Deum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁבְתִּ֥י בְשָׁל֖וֹם אֶל־בֵּ֣ית אָבִ֑י וְהָיָ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה לִ֖י לֵאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I shall return prosperously to my father's house: the Lord shall be my God:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tulen takaperin rauhassa kotia isäni tykö: ja Herra on minun Jumalani.
verses.king_james: So that I come again to my father’s house in peace; then shall the Lord be my God:

verses.latin_vulgate: et lapis iste, quem erexi in titulum, vocabitur Domus Dei : cunctorumque quæ dederis mihi, decimas offeram tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאֶ֣בֶן הַזֹּ֗את אֲשֶׁר־שַׂ֙מְתִּי֙ מַצֵּבָ֔ה יִהְיֶ֖ה בֵּ֣ית אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תִּתֶּן־לִ֔י עַשֵּׂ֖ר אֲעַשְּׂרֶ֥נּוּ לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And this stone, which I have set up for a title, shall be called the house of God: and of all things that thou shalt give to me, I will offer tithes to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tämä kivi, jonka minä panin pystyälle muistopatsaaksi, pitää oleman Jumalan huone: ja kaikista, jotkas minulle annat, annan minä tosin sinulle kymmenykset.
verses.king_james: And this stone, which I have set for a pillar, shall be God’s house: and of all that thou shalt give me I will surely give the tenth unto thee.
